steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: Being the first to do something is presented as “almost nothing is more effective” for accomplishing the blank goal. This tells us the blank word should describe what being first enables you to do with a lasting historical legacy.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
“Establish” means to create and make something permanent—which is exactly what being the first accomplishes, as pioneers forever become known as the founders of their achievements.

The others either describe harm (undermine, constrain) or recognition of something already existing (recognize), not creation of a legacy.

That confirms D is correct.
